signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Sign up with your email address.
signup.hint: At least 12 characters, one uppercase letter, and one digit.
signup.checkEmailDesc: If self-serve signup is available, we've sent a link to {email}. Open it to confirm your address and finish creating your account.
signup.unavailableDesc: Self-serve signup isn't enabled on this instance. Ask an administrator for an invitation.

verifyEmail.verifyingDesc: Hang tight while we verify your address.
verifyEmail.successDesc: Your account is active. Redirecting you now…
verifyEmail.missingDesc: This link is missing its verification token.
verifyEmail.errorHelp: The link may have expired or already been used. Try signing up again to get a new one.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentDesc: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a password-reset link. The link expires in 1 hour.

resetPassword.noTokenDesc: Ask your administrator to generate a password reset link for your account.
resetPassword.setDesc: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.hint: At least 12 characters, one uppercase letter, and one digit.
